headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of Rollins (ROL)
summary: Rollins has followed the market’s trajectory closely. The stock is down 8.1% to $53.41 per share over the past six months while the S&P 500 has lost 5.5%. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
